title: mangifera pedicellata
intro: Mangifera pedicellata, also known as the Philippine mango, is a species of tree in the family Anacardiaceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mangifera pedicellata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Mangifera pedicellata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
